hooks.command: IN=$(tmux display -t "$TMUX_PANE" -p '#{window_active}#{pane_active}' 2>/dev/null); if [ "$IN" = "11" ] && { ! command -v lsappinfo >/dev/null 2>&1 || lsappinfo info -only name "$(lsappinfo front)" 2>/dev/null | grep -qi kitty; }; then exit 0; fi; printf '\a' > "$(tmux display -t "$TMUX_PANE" -p '#{pane_tty}' 2>/dev/null || echo /dev/tty)"; exit 0
